cnf(u13,axiom,

cnf(u15,axiom,

cnf(u17,axiom,

cnf(u19,negated_conjecture,

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~begins_with_35(X0) | ~begins_with_34(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~begins_with_34(plate_tom)).

17. begins_with_35(plate_tom) [cnf transformation 5]
18. ~begins_with_35(X0) | ~begins_with_34(X0) [cnf transformation 12]

20. begins_with_34(plate_tom) [resolution 15,19]
